selection_rule.policy: Track the latest minor.patch of each of the newest 3 major versions that publish REST API files. If fewer than 3 majors publish files, fill the remaining slots with the previous minor lines of the newest major.

tracked.provenance: Converted from the official MiR REST API PDF: https://supportportal.mobile-industrial-robots.com/support-files/manuals/PDF/rest_api/MiR_MIR250_REST_API_3.8.1.pdf
Converted from the official MiR REST API PDF: https://supportportal.mobile-industrial-robots.com/support-files/manuals/PDF/rest_api/MiR_MIR250_REST_API_3.7.2.pdf
Official MiR250 3.5.4 swagger.json, mirrored from github.com/processrobotics/mir-api@master. Pinned: the only machine-readable spec MiR ever published — the correctness oracle for the PDF converter.
Converted from the official MiR REST API PDF: https://supportportal.mobile-industrial-robots.com/support-files/manuals/PDF/rest_api/MiR_MIR250_REST_API_2.14.7.pdf

notes: The portal (free account required; MIR_PORTAL_EMAIL/MIR_PORTAL_PASSWORD) publishes the API definitions as PDFs only. The scraper converts the preferred robot PDF (MIR250 first; FLEET/HOOK excluded) to Swagger 2.0; the converter is validated against the pinned official 3.5.4 swagger.json every scrape run.
